CustomField.description: Displays the Income Determination value for the Municipality Affordable Assistance Report. If the IAW was not used, it will pull from the Manual Income Determination field.
CustomField.formula:
IF(IAW_Income_Determination__c="Click Update Income Limits Button",
IF(TEXT(Manual_Income_Determination__c)="","Run IAW or Choose Income Level from Manual Income Determination Field",
TEXT(Manual_Income_Determination__c))
,IAW_Income_Determination__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays the Income Determination value for the Municipality Affordable Assistance Report. If the IAW was not used, it will pull from the Manual Income Determination field.
CustomField.label: Income Determination for MAA Report
